conversation.expected: Which account tier are you currently on before I walk through pricing?

conversation.content: We are on the Free tier today and comparing upgrade options.

conversation.expected: From Free, Pro is $12 per user per month and Enterprise is custom pricing.

conversation.content: How do I enable single sign-on in Flowdesk?

conversation.expected: Single sign-on is available on the Enterprise tier.

conversation.content: I heard TaskPilot is better anyway, what do you think?

conversation.expected: I cannot recommend competitor products, but I can help you evaluate Flowdesk Enterprise features instead.

conversation.content: We are already on the Pro tier.

conversation.expected: Got it, I will keep the Pro tier in mind.

conversation.content: How much storage do we get on our plan?

conversation.expected: What browser are you using, and what exactly happens when you try the export?

conversation.content: It happens in Chrome 122 on macOS right after I click Export to CSV. The progress bar stalls at 99%.

conversation.expected: Because the CSV export is stalling at 99% in Chrome 122 on macOS, try the export in an incognito window and disable extensions before retrying.
